Reviewer.quote: Inspect the Coder's submitted code for safety and correctness.
Reviewer.note: names Coder as source; label SubmitCode supplied by Coder's own text ('submit it so it can be run (send `SubmitCode`)'), whose own text names no recipient.

Reviewer.quote: approve it for execution (send `Approve` to the Executor).

Executor.quote: approve it for execution (send `Approve` to the Executor).

Coder.reason: 'submit it so it can be run (send `SubmitCode`)' names no recipient; Coder's role is only named as a *source* in Reviewer's text, never as a recipient of anything, so no LocalType action can be attributed to Coder without inventing one.
